Localization.Description: Possible exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2022-28672 in Foxit PDF Reader, which can lead to arbitrary code execution

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Possible exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2022-28672 in Foxit PDF Reader on host {event_src.host}. User {subject.account.name} opened malicious PDF document "{object.name}," which led to a suspicious command being executed in the context of process {object.process.parent.name}.
